name: Oberon Prime
description: Protect the balance with this regal forest guardian. Featuring altered mod polarities for greater customization.
passiveDescription: Oberon grants Righteous Negation to himself and his allies in <AFFINITY_SHARE>Affinity Range when he collects <HEALTH>Health Orbs, protecting players against the next instance of damage. Stacks up to |STACKS| times.

abilities.name: Smite
abilities.description: Focuses deadly energy within a target, dealing massive damage and removing all of its defenses, including Overguard. Enemies near the target also take a portion of the damage.

abilities.name: Hallowed Ground
abilities.description: Sanctifies the ground around Oberon, inflicting <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation Damage to all enemies within the radius. Also grants protection against Status Effects for Oberon and his allies.

abilities.name: Renewal
abilities.description: Generates a protective aura that grants bonus Armor to Oberon and his allies and restores allies’ Health over time. Healing is doubled while within the radius of Hallowed Ground.

abilities.name: Reckoning
abilities.description: Lifts enemies into the air and then hurls them down with conviction, removing their Armor. Enemies hit by this ability will grant Oberon additional Armor and have a chance to spawn a <HEALTH>Health Orb when they die.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Protect the balance with this regal forest guardian. Featuring altered mod polarities for greater customization.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Oberon Prime Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics

components.name: Orokin Cell

Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes: In the Veilbreaker and Nora’s Mix Vol 1 updates, we buffed a number of underused Warframe Augments (from Ash to Oberon). This third and final batch of buffs tackles Warframe Augments from Saryn to Zephyr. We have increased their viability in missions, which we hope will encourage more build diversity.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.7

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes: Increase Oberon's Reckoning armor reduction from 30% to 50%.

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Hotfix 31.7.2
patchlogs.changes:
While maintaining our original intentions to connect Railjack to some more ‘core Warframe’ style rewards, we’ve made a few changes to have Ash components be more new player friendly for those starting their Railjack journey. Having them live only in Rotation C brought feedback of accessibility concerns for newer players trying to complete their Ash build. While Oberon parts do drop in new player friendly areas, having his Neuroptics reside within the Veil Proxima was a steep climb to have a chance at collecting all the parts you need.
Moved Oberon Neuroptics from Veil Proxima to Earth, reducing Endo drops slightly and rearranging the drop %.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.changes: Updated the FX on Oberon's Hallowed Reckoning to be more visible.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.1.0: Echoes of War
patchlogs.changes: Changed Oberon's Passive description from ‘buff’ to ‘link’ since allied companions stats are calculated based on Oberon’s.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.changes:
For a long time now we’ve had a precedent with a handful of Warframe Skins where the “None” option for Attachments (and sometimes Syandanas) was removed if certain Skins, Primes, etc were equipped. This applied to Warframes such as Ember Prime/Pyraxis Skin, Frost, Mag Prime, Oberon, Volt, etc.
We now usher in a new “None” era! All Warframes and Warframe Skins that previously did not have the ‘None’ option will have a “None” Attachment or Syandana option, giving you even MORE customization flexibility. This means you can remove details such as any attachments on Ember Pyraxis, Mag Prime, the list goes on and on! In addition, Banshee, Frost and Oberon's default Shoulder Armor can now be equipped on Prime versions of the Warframe.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Oberon’s Smite VFX color not reflecting the player’s custom color choice.

patchlogs.name: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack: Hotfix 29.10.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Channeled Warframe Abilities (Oberon’s Renewal, etc) gaining Energy through Energy regeneration through Zenurik Energizing Dash or Energy Siphon. As per the norm, Energy regeneration is blocked if you are Channeling an Ability.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.changes:
Ash and Oberon have been added to Railjack rewards! Oberon Component Blueprints can be found in Grineer Railjack Point of Interest and Skirmish Bonus reward tables, and Ash Component Blueprints can be found in Corpus Railjack Defense mission rewards.
We’ve permanently removed Ash and Oberon Blueprints from Eximus and Manic drop tables respectively. We did this to connect Railjack to some more ‘core Warframe’ style rewards, and make their acquisition more straightforward for matchmaking purposes.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.6.1
patchlogs.changes:
Obaeron, Broberon, Goat Lord...these are just a few of the names bestowed upon our faithful Oberon. With the dedicated amount of continued feedback and passionate discussions about Oberon’s changes, the time has come to release another round of changes! Oberon Prime is right around the corner so the spotlight will be on him like never before. The changes below were brought forth from Dev discussions and by you, our devoted Tenno. Our goal has always been to give synergy to Oberon’s abilities, while still giving him a way to fill multiple roles in battle. We hope these further changes do just that.
Range Mods now apply 75% to Range (distance from Oberon) and 75% to Arc Angle of Hallowed Ground (before was 25% to Range and 75% to Arc before).
Oberon’s Renewal now heals friendly summoned units (IE Nekros’ Shadows of the Dead) at 1/3 the rate but consumes 1/3 the Energy drain for doing so. The change to have Renewal not affect friendly summons was met with varying opinions, and is now further tweaked to meet a happy middle ground. 
Oberon’s Renewal Armor buff will be applied to allies anytime they step on Hallowed Ground while Renewal is active on them as opposed to them having to be on Hallowed Ground when Renewal hits them.
Oberon’s Reckoning Armor debuff is now based on the target's base Armor instead of current Armor (meaning no more diminishing returns).

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.4.0
patchlogs.changes:
Increased Oberon's base energy from 100 to 150. 
Improved the visibility of Oberon’s Hallowed Ground FX. 
Fixed Oberon’s Renewal Energy per target Arsenal stat display not being affected by Efficiency Mods.
Fixed unequipping Oberon not returning Kavat/Kubrow Health to its original value until you enter a mission.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Oberon’s Passive not functioning in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Decreased Oberon’s Renewal stats to balance the removal of Heal Time in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes:
Oberon’s ability to keep himself and his teammates alive is a large part of his overall role. Feedback brought forth further tweaks with the intention to solidify this role.
Removed Heal Time from Renewal. Renewal now functions more conventionally as a toggle which drains 2 Energy per second while active + 3 Energy per second per target actively being healed. *Please note that Trinity's Energy Vampire will not give Oberon Energy while Renewal is active.
Fixed a script error with Hallowed Eruption Augment upon deactivating while another Oberon has Hallowed Ground active, resulting in the FX to remain forever.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.3.0
patchlogs.changes:
Whenever Oberon casts Renewal on an ally standing on Hallowed Ground, it activates Iron Renewal, granting an Armor boost for the entire heal process, once healing is complete the Armor Boost is on a timer.
Tweaked Oberon’s abilities to reflect his changes in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.3
patchlogs.changes: Solving Vex Armor actually takes as back to Chroma's beginning. On original power creation, we used some less-than-ideal calculation methods to create Scorn and Fury's effects. If you are an avid Chroma user, you probably know the power maximizing this ability brings. At some point in Chroma's future we will need to revisit and use ideal methods for his Abilities; we will inform you well in advance when Chroma is under review. As you may or may not know, Oberon is currently under review at this time!

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20

Oberon's passive has been updated to give him immunity to Impair in Conclave.
Oberon's Reckoning damage increased in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.4.1
patchlogs.additions: Zephyr and Oberon abilities added to Codex/Enemy drops.

patchlogs.name: Update 12.4.0
patchlogs.additions: ·         Grineer Shipyards tile set revealed with new “Hijack” game mode & Tethra’s Doom event!·         New Prime items in the Void!    Rhino Prime    Ankyros Prime    Boltor Prime    AkBronco Prime·         2x new Alternate helmets (Valkyr, Oberon)·         New Corpus Crewmen voices are here! They now have their own language and a whole new style as voted by the Design Council!

patchlogs.name: Update 12.3.0: The Grustrag Three
patchlogs.fixes: 4x Immortal Skins: Nekros, Valkyr, Oberon, and Ember!

patchlogs.name: Update 12: Zephyr Rises
patchlogs.changes: Oberon's Regeneration projectile speed increase.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.8.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed some unnatural physics issues with Oberon's surcoat.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.5.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Oberon’s Reckoning, the power was not working on enemies that were already under the influence of a reaction animation.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Oberon's Smite being useless in Conclaves.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.5.0: The Cicero Crisis.
patchlogs.fixes: New Warframe: OBERON – the Paladin Warframe! Equally adept at healing friends or striking down the enemy. Oberon embodies the balance Tenno are sworn to uphold. Find him today by fighting Vay Hek!
